steps.title: Use zero for the intercept
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept happens when $x=0$. Substitute $0$ into the function:
$$f(0)=(-6)(5)^0+29$$

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content:
Since $5^0=1$:
$$f(0)=(-6)(1)+29=23$$
The intercept is $(0,23)$. Choice A is $(0,23)$; the other choices use either the base, vertical shift, or coefficient instead. The answer is A.
